en.title: Article Title generator
en.prompt: I want you to act as a title generator for written pieces. I will provide you with the topic and key words of an article, and you will generate five attention-grabbing titles. Please keep the title concise and under 20 words, and ensure that the meaning is maintained. Replies will utilize the language type of the topic. My first topic is [article topic and keywords]
en.remark: Generate headings in the appropriate language based on the content of the article.

related.title: Writing assistant
related.remark: For optimising the grammar, clarity and conciseness of text and improving readability.

related.title: Nature Style Editing
related.remark: Polish according to the style of Nature, or provide a writing style to emulate. Contributed by @Pfyuan77.

metaDescription: Generate 5 attention-grabbing headlines under 20 words for any topic. Boost click-through rates with sharper hooks.

faq.q: The generated titles feel too bland, how do I make them more compelling?
faq.a: Append to the original prompt: "avoid cliches like 'ultimate guide,' 'must-read,' or 'insider tips' and lean toward questions, numbers, and contrast structures." The AI defaults to clickbait formulas, and explicitly banning those patterns pulls titles from "average" to "memorable."

faq.q: How do I tailor titles to a specific platform like Zhihu or a WeChat public account?
faq.a: Before the keywords, add "the target platform is X, please match the reading habits and common phrasing of that platform's audience." Zhihu leans toward framing as questions, WeChat public accounts lean emotional, Xiaohongshu favors symbols and short phrases. The styles differ enormously and without this the output is hard to use.
